chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-1291 of 2022 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Nazir Report dated 26.11.2020. 2. For orders on CMA No.22961/2024. 3. For orders on CMA No.16547/2024. 4. For orders on CMA No.8323/2024. 5. For hearing of main case. 24.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Zakir, advocate / petitioner No.2. Ms. Saima Imdad, AAG. Mr. Nadir Khan Burdi, advocate for respondent No.6. Mr. Usman Farooq, advocate for TMC Nazimabad. Mr. Khurram Ghayas, advocate for KMC. ------------- The main grievance of the petitioners is that a playground is being used as a dumping ground for garbage and the petitioners want removal of the same by the competent authority. Learned counsel for respondent No.6 / Sindh Sold Waste Management has stated that although it was not within their jurisdiction but they have cleared all the wastes from the aforesaid playground. In view of the above, since the directions have already been issued by this Court vide order dated 09.05.2025, the concerned TMC Nazimabad shall ensure that no further garbage is placed on the aforesaid park. The instant petition is disposed of in the above terms along with listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
